subcodes.first_line: O faithful servant of the Blessed Beauty and herald of the Covenant and proclaimer of truth in those regions! Praise be to God in this [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده صادق جمال مبارک و مبشر میثاق و منادی حق در ان اطراف الحمد لله در این
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @prayer for teaching, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
